{{CargoRelic
|name=The Birth of Tragedy
|class_id=22870
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Birth of Tragedy is a philosophical work by German philosopher Friedrich Nietzsche. Through the exploration of ancient Greek tragedy, the book delves into the essence of art and aesthetics, offering profound reflections on life and human existence. In the book, Nietzsche introduces the concepts of the Apollonian and Dionysian spirits, using them as entry points to reinterpret ancient Greek culture from a unique perspective and with insightful language, further exploring the origins, essence, and function of art, as well as the meaning of life. This work is not only the birthplace of Nietzsche's philosophical thought but also a representative work of his aesthetic theory, having a profound impact on later fields such as philosophy, literature, and art.
|fame=76
|art=64
|fth=65
|civ=106
|tech=51
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>All minion skins HP +10%<br>prop@54128_2<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>All minion skins HP +20%<br>prop@54128_2<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>All minion skins HP +30%<br>prop@54128_2<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>All minion skins HP +50%<br>prop@54128_2<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>All minion skins HP +70%<br>prop@54128_2<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss6=Snail ATK +120<br>All minion skins HP +100%<br>prop@54128_2<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60
|ss7=Snail ATK +120<br>All minion skins HP +100%<br>prop@54128_2<br>Minion Skins crafted: 60/60<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Purple Reagent Drops +6%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Incense Drops +3%
}}
